nasb.text: “Now you, son of man, set your face against the daughters of your people who are prophesying from their own inspiration. Prophesy against them

esv.text: “And you, son of man, set your face against the daughters of your people, who prophesy out of their own hearts. Prophesy against them

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要面向民中那些隨著自己心意說預言的女子，說預言攻擊她們。你要說：

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要说预言斥责你同胞中私自发预言的女子，
